seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Mixture of frontier models (Opus, GPT 5.5, GLM) on Abacus AI SuperComputer infrastructure enables a single-prompt agent to vibe-code entire startups including custom YouTube-like apps.
Credit-card access to explore the jagged frontier of LLMs is closing, limiting quirky experimentation paths that previously led to AI careers.
